creator: ghostp@dzsy.org
text:
If i boot without ACPI i have brightness controll on my mashine, but i miss lot of thinks from acpi. If i started the computer with ACPI I haven't brightness control. Anything on ACPI probably work fine.

I run on XOrg the xev program and it send me keycode for the volume up/down,
brightness up/down if ACPI enabled.

My Custon kernel only:
include         GENERIC
ident           DZSYNOTE

device          atapicam

How-To-Repeat: Everytime i boot with ACPI enabled.
